rulings.Rulings: SUSTAIN WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. SEE WASATCH PROPERTY MANAGMENT V. DEGRATE, C.D.O.S. 11/19/02. COURT ASSUMES THAT GOVERNMENT CONTRACT HAS CLAUSE WHICH STATES THAT GOVERNMENT CONTRACT AUTOMATICALLY TERMINATES UPON LEASE TERMINATION.
